programs.title: This Spells Disaster
programs.desc: The gang is planning a surprise for Puppycorn, so they spell things out when talking so he won't find out. Desperate to know what they're saying, Puppycorn finds a magic book that he thinks will help him learn to spell… but unbeknownst to him, it's teaching him how to cast spells! Will Puppycorn realize that knowledge is power... and some secrets are kept for a reason?

programs.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programs.desc: Liko and Meowscarada face off against a fellow Nidothing fan who really loves Litten.

programs.title: Gg: Spawn Squad
programs.sub_title: Jess Builds a Dream Room for KK Slider!
programs.desc: Jess and Gem take a first look at the latest Animal Crossing: New Horizons update! With their combined decorating skills, will Gem and Jess be able to impress the hotel's latest guest - the world famous rockstar KK Slider?

programs.title: Dance With Tom
programs.desc: Tom teaches a Mungera dance. Mungera is the Yugambeh word for Gumtree. The Gumtree is home to many birds and animals and keeps them safe. Join Tom in a Mungera dance to be strong and remember to feel good protecting others!

programs.title: Numberblocks
programs.sub_title: All the Numbers I Can Be
programs.desc: One is in awe of how many numbers One Hundred has inside - but exactly how many are there? One Hundred takes her on a journey to find out.

programs.title: Odd Squad
programs.sub_title: Orchid's Almost Half Hour Talent Show
programs.desc: All the agents want to be a part of Orchid’s talent show.
